title: Kids Fun Box of Craft with Glitter Glue, Pom Poms, Beads, Wobbly Eyes, Pipe Cleaners, Foam Shapes & More – Arts & Crafts Supplies for Ages 5+ – Ideal Rainy Day Activity, Craft Parties & Creative Play
features: Complete Craft Kit for Kids – This bumper craft box is packed with all the essentials for endless creative projects, including glitter glue, pom poms, wobbly eyes, beads, foam shapes, and more!
Encourages Creativity & Imagination – Ideal for little creators! Children can design bracelets, puppets, greeting cards, characters, and more – a great way to enhance artistic skills
Fun for Rainy Days & Quiet Time – This craft kit is a go-to for rainy days, craft parties, or quiet time; it’s an easy, screen-free way to keep kids entertained for hours
Easy to Carry & Transport– Comes in a vibrant, portable box with an integrated carry handle, making it easy to bring to playdates, holidays, or anywhere crafting fun is needed
Safe & Easy-to-Use Materials – Recommended for kids aged 5+, the kit includes safe, high-quality materials for little hands and budding artists to explore independently
Create Unique Gifts & Decorations – With materials like envelopes, coloured card, and sequin stars, kids can craft personalised gifts, decorations, and greeting cards for friends and family
Supports Fine Motor Skills – This craft box promotes motor skill development as kids cut, glue, and assemble; ideal for nurturing creativity, hand-eye coordination, and attention to detail
description: Fun Box of Craft – the ultimate bumper craft kit designed to inspire young imaginations and keep little hands busy. This delightful set has everything kids aged 5+ need to create colourful characters, dazzling decorations, and charming gifts. It’s an ideal choice for rainy days, playdates, craft parties, or simply as a fun way to unwind and explore new ideas. Inside this brightly coloured box, young crafters will discover an exciting variety of materials. From glitter glue tubes to wobbly eyes, assorted pom poms, pipe cleaners, and foam shapes, each item is carefully selected to support endless creativity and imaginative play. The bag of beads is great for making bracelets and jewellery, while the A5 coloured cards and envelopes allow kids to make unique greeting cards and personalised gifts. Whether making playful characters like butterflies, mermaids, or monsters, or crafting puppets, dolly friends, or vibrant flowers, the possibilities are endless. The addition of sequins, tissue paper, and wooden lolly sticks offers even more ways to build, decorate, and invent. The included craft glue ensures all creations come together securely, allowing kids to showcase their masterpieces with pride. This craft box is designed with convenience in mind. Its integrated carry handle makes it easy for children to bring it to friends’ houses, family gatherings, or around the home. This craft kit also provides a great screen-free alternative, offering hours of hands-on entertainment that engages kids’ fine motor skills, boosts creativity, and develops problem-solving skills in an enjoyable and relaxed way. Choose the Fun Box of Craft to give children the joy of creation and an opportunity to express themselves through colour, texture, and design. A fantastic gift that’s both educational and entertaining, it’s ideal for any occasion or as a rainy-day saviour. Let the creativity begin!
